content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize/palette code too.

agent1: Done with sort_palette. In Image.py I changed quantize()'s signature (added sort_palette=None as last kwarg) and added an 'if sort_palette: im = im._sort_palette(sort_palette)' + return im right before the final 'return im' in the non-reference-palette branch (around line ~1122-1132), plus a new private method _sort_palette() right after quantize(). I did NOT touch the palette= (reference image) branch. If your lightness_factor also needs a post-processing step, please add it right before/after my sort_palette hook (compose them, don't overwrite), and add your kwarg after mine or before - just keep both kwargs in the signature. Tests I added are at the bottom of Tests/test_image_quantize.py (test_sort_palette_brightness/rgb/invalid) - should not collide with your new tests unless you also append at file end, in which case let's check with git diff before finalizing.
